name: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc.
description: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. is a leading global hospitality company with a portfolio of world-class brands spanning lodging sectors from luxury and full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and focused-service hotels. Founded in 1919, the company manages, franchises, owns, and leases hotels, resorts, and timeshare properties. Its premier brand portfolio includes Hilton Hotels & Resorts, Waldorf Astoria, Conrad, DoubleTree, Embassy Suites, and Hampton, serving millions of guests worldwide through its award-winning Hilton Honors guest loyalty program.
